items.name: Office Automatic Updates 2.0
items.actions: C:\Program Files\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\ClickToRun\OfficeC2RClient.exe /frequentupdate SCHEDULEDTASK displaylevel=False
items.description: This task ensures that your Microsoft Office installation can check for updates.
